title: Bridge Essay: Neural dynamics of the intention to speak.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Language/Mantra bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**Neural dynamics of the intention to speak.** — Cerebral cortex (New York, N.Y. : 1991) (2010). PMID: 20008453. DOI: 10.1093/cercor/bhp255. Score: 30. When we talk we communicate our intentions. Although the origin of intentional action is debated in cognitive neuroscience, the question of how the brain generates the intention in speech remains still open. Using magnetoencephalography, we investigated the cortical dynamics engaged when healthy subjects attended to either their intention to speak or their actual speech.
